Uses of Interface
javax.media.mscontrol.mixer.MixerAdapter

Packages that use MixerAdapter
javax.media.mscontrol.mixer A MediaMixer has the capacity to combine the media streams coming from multiple sources, into a single media stream. 
 

Uses of MixerAdapter in javax.media.mscontrol.mixer
 

Fields in javax.media.mscontrol.mixer with type parameters of type MixerAdapter
static Configuration<MixerAdapter> MixerAdapter.DTMF_CLAMP
          This config clamps the DTMF's that would otherwise enter the Mixer.
static Configuration<MixerAdapter> MixerAdapter.DTMFCLAMP_VOLUME
          This config clamps the DTMF's that would otherwise enter the Mixer, and include a volume control.
static Configuration<MixerAdapter> MixerAdapter.EMPTY
          This config is a pass-through, no media processing is performed on any stream.
 

Methods in javax.media.mscontrol.mixer that return MixerAdapter
 MixerAdapter MediaMixer.createMixerAdapter(Configuration<MixerAdapter> predefinedConfig)
          Create a MixerAdapter.
 MixerAdapter MediaMixer.createMixerAdapter(Configuration<MixerAdapter> predefinedConfig, Parameters params)
          Create a MixerAdapter.
 MixerAdapter MediaMixer.createMixerAdapter(MediaConfig config, Parameters params)
          Create a MixerAdapter.
 

Method parameters in javax.media.mscontrol.mixer with type arguments of type MixerAdapter
 MixerAdapter MediaMixer.createMixerAdapter(Configuration<MixerAdapter> predefinedConfig)
          Create a MixerAdapter.
 MixerAdapter MediaMixer.createMixerAdapter(Configuration<MixerAdapter> predefinedConfig, Parameters params)
